Though the AD&D'" game com ba t system Is sufficient to most of your com­ bat needs. this chapter will give you optio nal rules and advice whi ch can add navo r to your game. h 's importan t t o remem ber th ai everythi ng In this chaple r Is an optJonaJ ru le: nothing rec­ ommended here can be Imple­ memed In your campaign with out the DM's permi ssion.
